name: bff-microservices
description: Microservices with BFF pattern - Task Management System

scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/task-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/bff-web" "npm run dev --workspace=services/bff-mobile"
